scenes.narration: Your zodiac sign... is probably wrong.
Western astrology uses the tropical zodiac — based on seasons. But the actual stars have shifted 24 degrees over 1,700 years.
Vedic astrology uses the sidereal zodiac — fixed to real star positions. So if you're a Taurus in Western... you're likely an Aries in Vedic.
Which system reveals your TRUE personality? Vedic astrology has been doing this for 5,000 years.
Check your real Vedic sign — free — at Dekho Panchang dot com.
